{"text":"双楠","styles":[{"fill":{"content":{"solid":{"color":[1,1,1]}}},"font":{"path":"D:/Program Files (x86)/剪映6.3/6.3.0.11779/Resources/Font/SystemFont/zh-hans.ttf","id":""},"size":15,"effectStyle":{"path":"C:/Users/Administrator/AppData/Local/JianyingPro/User Data/Cache/effect/922099/893df30edadda8bf6a3f26b7e3024c39","id":"6800561034793849357"},"range":[0,2]}]}

stickers.name: 卡通可爱骑自行车的女孩

texts.content: {"text":"通用模板","styles":[{"fill":{"content":{"solid":{"color":[0,0,0]}}},"font":{"path":"D:/Program Files (x86)/剪映6.3/6.3.0.11779/Resources/Font/后现代体.otf","id":"6740435494053614093"},"strokes":[{"content":{"solid":{"color":[1,1,1]}},"width":0.20000000298023224}],"size":21,"range":[0,4]}]}

{"styles":[{"fill":{"content":{"render_type":"solid","solid":{"alpha":1.0,"color":[1.0,1.0,1.0]}}},"font":{"id":"6740435494053614093","path":"D:/Program Files (x86)/剪映6.3/6.3.0.11779/Resources/Font/后现代体.otf"},"range":[0,9],"size":9,"strokes":[{"alpha":1.0,"content":{"render_type":"solid","solid":{"alpha":1.0,"color":[0.0,0.0,0.0]}},"width":0.07999999821186066}],"useLetterColor":true}],"text":"故事虚构 请勿模仿"}

{"text":"双楠主","styles":[{"fill":{"content":{"solid":{"color":[1,0.87058824300766,0]}}},"font":{"path":"D:/Program Files (x86)/剪映6.3/6.3.0.11779/Resources/Font/后现代体.otf","id":"6740435494053614093"},"strokes":[{"content":{"solid":{"color":[0,0,0]}},"width":0.085714288055896759}],"size":9,"useLetterColor":true,"range":[0,3]}]}

{"text":"@叶倾城","styles":[{"fill":{"content":{"solid":{"color":[1,1,1]}}},"font":{"path":"D:/Program Files (x86)/剪映6.3/6.3.0.11779/Resources/Font/新青年体.ttf","id":"6740435892441190919"},"size":15,"range":[0,4]}]}

{"text":"沈律师","styles":[{"fill":{"content":{"solid":{"color":[1,1,1]}}},"font":{"path":"D:/Program Files (x86)/剪映6.3/6.3.0.11779/Resources/Font/后现代体.otf","id":"6740435494053614093"},"strokes":[{"content":{"solid":{"color":[0,0,0]}},"width":0.20000000298023224}],"size":10,"bold":true,"range":[0,3]}]}

{"text":"我刚发了份离*协议给你","styles":[{"fill":{"content":{"solid":{"color":[1,1,1]}}},"font":{"path":"D:/Program Files (x86)/剪映6.3/6.3.0.11779/Resources/Font/后现代体.otf","id":"6740435494053614093"},"strokes":[{"content":{"solid":{"color":[0,0,0]}},"width":0.20000000298023224}],"size":10,"bold":true,"range":[0,11]}]}

{"text":"这是我和我太太结婚第一天就签好的","styles":[{"fill":{"content":{"solid":{"color":[1,1,1]}}},"font":{"path":"D:/Program Files (x86)/剪映6.3/6.3.0.11779/Resources/Font/后现代体.otf","id":"6740435494053614093"},"strokes":[{"content":{"solid":{"color":[0,0,0]}},"width":0.20000000298023224}],"size":10,"bold":true,"range":[0,16]}]}

{"text":"你看看有啥问题没","styles":[{"fill":{"content":{"solid":{"color":[1,1,1]}}},"font":{"path":"D:/Program Files (x86)/剪映6.3/6.3.0.11779/Resources/Font/后现代体.otf","id":"6740435494053614093"},"strokes":[{"content":{"solid":{"color":[0,0,0]}},"width":0.20000000298023224}],"size":10,"bold":true,"range":[0,8]}]}

{"text":"我站在落地窗前","styles":[{"fill":{"content":{"solid":{"color":[1,1,1]}}},"font":{"path":"D:/Program Files (x86)/剪映6.3/6.3.0.11779/Resources/Font/后现代体.otf","id":"6740435494053614093"},"strokes":[{"content":{"solid":{"color":[0,0,0]}},"width":0.20000000298023224}],"size":10,"bold":true,"range":[0,7]}]}

{"text":"手指不自觉地摩挲着手机边缘","styles":[{"fill":{"content":{"solid":{"color":[1,1,1]}}},"font":{"path":"D:/Program Files (x86)/剪映6.3/6.3.0.11779/Resources/Font/后现代体.otf","id":"6740435494053614093"},"strokes":[{"content":{"solid":{"color":[0,0,0]}},"width":0.20000000298023224}],"size":10,"bold":true,"range":[0,13]}]}

{"text":"谢先生","styles":[{"fill":{"content":{"solid":{"color":[1,1,1]}}},"font":{"path":"D:/Program Files (x86)/剪映6.3/6.3.0.11779/Resources/Font/后现代体.otf","id":"6740435494053614093"},"strokes":[{"content":{"solid":{"color":[0,0,0]}},"width":0.20000000298023224}],"size":10,"bold":true,"range":[0,3]}]}

{"text":"协议我看过了","styles":[{"fill":{"content":{"solid":{"color":[1,1,1]}}},"font":{"path":"D:/Program Files (x86)/剪映6.3/6.3.0.11779/Resources/Font/后现代体.otf","id":"6740435494053614093"},"strokes":[{"content":{"solid":{"color":[0,0,0]}},"width":0.20000000298023224}],"size":10,"bold":true,"range":[0,6]}]}

{"text":"没啥问题","styles":[{"fill":{"content":{"solid":{"color":[1,1,1]}}},"font":{"path":"D:/Program Files (x86)/剪映6.3/6.3.0.11779/Resources/Font/后现代体.otf","id":"6740435494053614093"},"strokes":[{"content":{"solid":{"color":[0,0,0]}},"width":0.20000000298023224}],"size":10,"bold":true,"range":[0,4]}]}

{"text":"电话那头传来律师很专业的声音","styles":[{"fill":{"content":{"solid":{"color":[1,1,1]}}},"font":{"path":"D:/Program Files (x86)/剪映6.3/6.3.0.11779/Resources/Font/后现代体.otf","id":"6740435494053614093"},"strokes":[{"content":{"solid":{"color":[0,0,0]}},"width":0.20000000298023224}],"size":10,"bold":true,"range":[0,14]}]}

{"text":"距离三年期满还有一个月","styles":[{"fill":{"content":{"solid":{"color":[1,1,1]}}},"font":{"path":"D:/Program Files (x86)/剪映6.3/6.3.0.11779/Resources/Font/后现代体.otf","id":"6740435494053614093"},"strokes":[{"content":{"solid":{"color":[0,0,0]}},"width":0.20000000298023224}],"size":10,"bold":true,"range":[0,11]}]}

{"text":"到期后协议自动生效","styles":[{"fill":{"content":{"solid":{"color":[1,1,1]}}},"font":{"path":"D:/Program Files (x86)/剪映6.3/6.3.0.11779/Resources/Font/后现代体.otf","id":"6740435494053614093"},"strokes":[{"content":{"solid":{"color":[0,0,0]}},"width":0.20000000298023224}],"size":10,"bold":true,"range":[0,9]}]}

{"text":"直接去民政局领离*证就行","styles":[{"fill":{"content":{"solid":{"color":[1,1,1]}}},"font":{"path":"D:/Program Files (x86)/剪映6.3/6.3.0.11779/Resources/Font/后现代体.otf","id":"6740435494053614093"},"strokes":[{"content":{"solid":{"color":[0,0,0]}},"width":0.20000000298023224}],"size":10,"bold":true,"range":[0,12]}]}

{"text":"好的","styles":[{"fill":{"content":{"solid":{"color":[1,1,1]}}},"font":{"path":"D:/Program Files (x86)/剪映6.3/6.3.0.11779/Resources/Font/后现代体.otf","id":"6740435494053614093"},"strokes":[{"content":{"solid":{"color":[0,0,0]}},"width":0.20000000298023224}],"size":10,"bold":true,"range":[0,2]}]}

{"text":"谢谢","styles":[{"fill":{"content":{"solid":{"color":[1,1,1]}}},"font":{"path":"D:/Program Files (x86)/剪映6.3/6.3.0.11779/Resources/Font/后现代体.otf","id":"6740435494053614093"},"strokes":[{"content":{"solid":{"color":[0,0,0]}},"width":0.20000000298023224}],"size":10,"bold":true,"range":[0,2]}]}

{"text":"挂断电话","styles":[{"fill":{"content":{"solid":{"color":[1,1,1]}}},"font":{"path":"D:/Program Files (x86)/剪映6.3/6.3.0.11779/Resources/Font/后现代体.otf","id":"6740435494053614093"},"strokes":[{"content":{"solid":{"color":[0,0,0]}},"width":0.20000000298023224}],"size":10,"bold":true,"range":[0,4]}]}

{"text":"我抬头看向墙上的婚纱照","styles":[{"fill":{"content":{"solid":{"color":[1,1,1]}}},"font":{"path":"D:/Program Files (x86)/剪映6.3/6.3.0.11779/Resources/Font/后现代体.otf","id":"6740435494053614093"},"strokes":[{"content":{"solid":{"color":[0,0,0]}},"width":0.20000000298023224}],"size":10,"bold":true,"range":[0,11]}]}

{"text":"照片里的我穿着白色西装","styles":[{"fill":{"content":{"solid":{"color":[1,1,1]}}},"font":{"path":"D:/Program Files (x86)/剪映6.3/6.3.0.11779/Resources/Font/后现代体.otf","id":"6740435494053614093"},"strokes":[{"content":{"solid":{"color":[0,0,0]}},"width":0.20000000298023224}],"size":10,"bold":true,"range":[0,11]}]}

{"text":"笑得特别满足","styles":[{"fill":{"content":{"solid":{"color":[1,1,1]}}},"font":{"path":"D:/Program Files (x86)/剪映6.3/6.3.0.11779/Resources/Font/后现代体.otf","id":"6740435494053614093"},"strokes":[{"content":{"solid":{"color":[0,0,0]}},"width":0.20000000298023224}],"size":10,"bold":true,"range":[0,6]}]}

{"text":"而站在我身边的沈知鸢","styles":[{"fill":{"content":{"solid":{"color":[1,1,1]}}},"font":{"path":"D:/Program Files (x86)/剪映6.3/6.3.0.11779/Resources/Font/后现代体.otf","id":"6740435494053614093"},"strokes":[{"content":{"solid":{"color":[0,0,0]}},"width":0.20000000298023224}],"size":10,"bold":true,"range":[0,10]}]}

{"text":"一身洁白婚纱","styles":[{"fill":{"content":{"solid":{"color":[1,1,1]}}},"font":{"path":"D:/Program Files (x86)/剪映6.3/6.3.0.11779/Resources/Font/后现代体.otf","id":"6740435494053614093"},"strokes":[{"content":{"solid":{"color":[0,0,0]}},"width":0.20000000298023224}],"size":10,"bold":true,"range":[0,6]}]}
